articles.description:
A turning point on AI agents in Cybersecurity, shown in two recent research papers from UC Berkeley and Stanford:  CyberGym:  AI agents discovered 15 zero-days in major open-source software

  BountyBench:  AI agents solved real-world bug bounty tasks worth tens of thousands of dollars

This represents a pivotal shift in cybersecurity — AI agents can now autonomously do what only elite human hackers could before.Check out their work:CyberGym: https://www.cybergym.io/BountyBench: https://bountybe

articles.author: Peter Saktor
articles.description:
What is MCP?

The Model Context Protocol (MCP) is a standardized way for AI systems to access and interact with various external resources file systems, databases, APIs, and other services. Instead of writing unique connectors for each integration, MCP provides a unified interface that any compliant system can use.
